title: myriophyllum verticillatum subsp. spicatum
intro: Myriophyllum verticillatum subsp. spicatum, also known as water milfoil or spicate water milfoil, is a subspecies of aquatic plant belonging to the family Haloragaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Myriophyllum verticillatum subsp. spicatum include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in water or using them in tinctures and teas to harness its medicinal properties.
